description: Capabilities document whose supported_did_methods does not contain 'did:web'. RFC-ACDP-0001 §5.4 mandates that v0.1.0 producers use did:web and §5.11 mandates that registries resolve did:web; the schema enforces this via `contains: { const: "did:web" }` (acdp-capabilities.schema.json line 60). A consumer MUST reject a capabilities document missing 'did:web' as schema_violation.

expected.consumer_action: MUST NOT proceed with operations against this registry. A registry that cannot resolve did:web cannot validate any v0.1.0 publish request (every conformant producer signs with a did:web key per RFC-ACDP-0001 §5.4).
expected.rationale: did:web is the only DID method mandatory in v0.1.0. Future versions will widen the set; a registry advertising only did:key today is conformant for some hypothetical future-version producer flow but not for v0.1.0 interop.
